caption: A man with an upright, grey-blonde hairstyle, glasses, and headphones sits at a desk in a studio setting. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt with a red and white bowtie and suspenders. In front of him is a black microphone on a stand. To his left and slightly behind him, a woman with pink hair and a green dress stands, looking toward him. The background features posters, including one with a shield logo and another with the text "UNIQUE FASHION". On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST" on the left and the text "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, subtly shifting his head and gaze while appearing to listen or speak, while the woman remains standing in the background.
